content:
type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding idle_timeout_s param, self._last_chunk_ts tracking in __init__, timestamp refresh in receive() on non-empty chunk, and new tick(now_ts=None) method for idle-timeout heartbeat; will reset state unconditionally on timeout. Purely additive - should not conflict with your debug logging as long as we both append new lines rather than rewrite shared blocks.

content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added idle_timeout_s param as the new last param in __init__ signature (after allow_reuse), self.idle_timeout_s/self._last_chunk_ts init at end of __init__, timestamp refresh added in receive() right after the chunk_message-is-None check (~line 100-103), and a new tick() method inserted between receive() and flush(). Please append your debug/debug_logger params after idle_timeout_s (not after allow_reuse) to avoid a signature merge conflict, and re-read the file now before inserting your log lines since exact line numbers shifted by ~30 lines.
